zh.lifeSummary: 當Maria Sharott於1532年出生在英國越可爾希亞活時，她的父親Samson Sharrot30歲，母親Margaret Sharrott27歲。她於大約1543年與Richard Leavitt結婚。她去世於1569年7月6日在英國越可爾約克享年37歲。

nameMeanings.name: Sharott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Sherrard
meanings: from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Shirard (Old English Scīrheard, composed of the elements scīr ‘bright’ and heard ‘hard, bold’). Alternatively, the name may be a nickname deriving from Middle English shir (Old English scīr) ‘bright, fair’, with the addition of the Anglo-Norman French suffix -ard.

local pronunciation of Sherwood , especially perhaps in Leicestershire, Kent, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Sussex, and Yorkshire. It may also have been much confused with Skerritt . This name, or the name in 1 above, has been established in Ireland (Derry) since the 17th century, along with Sherwood (in most provinces).

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Maria Sharott was born in 1532, in Harewood, Yorkshire, England, her father, Samson Sharrot, was 30 and her mother, Margaret Sharrott, was 27. She married Richard Leavitt about 1543. She died on 6 July 1569, in York, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maria Sharott est née en 1532, à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Samson Sharrot, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret Sharrott, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Leavitt environ 1543. Elle est décédée le 6 juillet 1569, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Maria Sharott(이)가 1532년 영국 요르크실르 하레우드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Samson Sharrot(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Sharrott(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1543년 Richard Leavitt(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1569년 7월 6일 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maria Sharott родилась в 1532 г. в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Samson Sharrot было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Sharrott, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Leavitt около 1543 г. Она умерла 6 июля 1569 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 37 лет.
